capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an Incident Management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have an Incident Management service.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise incident management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the Incident Management service reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the Incident Management service reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent incident management service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the Incident Management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the Incident Management service.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for incident management service

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the Incident Management service reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the Incident Management service reviewed frequently.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent KPI/KRI review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized, documented process for incident management applicable enterprise wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized, documented process for incident management applicable enterprise wide.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented enterprise-wide incident management process

questions.prompt: Is security orchestration and automation responses utilized as part of incident management?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is security orchestration and automation responses utilized as part of incident management.
questions.evaluation_focus: SOAR utilized as part of incident management

questions.prompt: Is the incident management process reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the incident management process reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent incident management process review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized, documented process for triaging incidents applicable enterprise wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized, documented process for triaging incidents applicable enterprise wide.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented enterprise-wide triaging process

questions.prompt: Is security orchestration and automation responses utilized as part of triaging?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is security orchestration and automation responses utilized as part of triaging.
questions.evaluation_focus: SOAR utilized as part of triaging

questions.prompt: Is the triaging process reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the triaging process reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent triaging process review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise engage in table top exercises for threat scenarios that may have broader reputational and monetary impact (ransomware etc.)?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise engage in table top exercises for threat scenarios that may have broader reputational and monetary impact (ransomware etc.).
questions.evaluation_focus: Tabletop exercises for high-impact threat scenarios

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise review findings and implement the recommendations from the tabletop exercises?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise review findings and implement the recommendations from the tabletop exercises.
questions.evaluation_focus: Review and implement tabletop exercise recommendations

questions.prompt: Does the incident management system utilize predictive analysis to predict possible threat scenarios?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the incident management system utilize predictive analysis to predict possible threat scenarios.
questions.evaluation_focus: Predictive analysis for threat scenarios

questions.prompt: Does the prediction of threat scenarios happen automatically based on traffic patterns and other baselines?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the prediction of threat scenarios happen automatically based on traffic patterns and other baselines.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic prediction based on traffic patterns and baselines

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have the appropriate segmentation and other incident management process to contain day zero attacks?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have the appropriate segmentation and other incident management process to contain day zero attacks.
questions.evaluation_focus: Segmentation and processes to contain day-zero attacks

questions.prompt: Does the containment of threats and attacks happen automatically (either by effective segmentation design or rapid threat containment)?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the containment of threats and attacks happen automatically (either by effective segmentation design or rapid threat containment).
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic threat and attack containment

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for implementing and utilizing threat hunting?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for implementing and utilizing threat hunting.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented threat hunting process

questions.prompt: Is the threat hunting process automated and performed by personnel with the right skillset?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the threat hunting process automated and performed by personnel with the right skillset.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated threat hunting with skilled personnel

questions.prompt: Does the incident management system have capability to automate threat hunting to some level?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the incident management system have capability to automate threat hunting to some level.
questions.evaluation_focus: Incident management system threat hunting automation

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented incident response plan?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented incident response plan.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented incident response plan

questions.prompt: Is the incident response plan reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the incident response plan reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent incident response plan review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a clear and documented hierarchy for incident management as part of the incident response plan? Are the first responders and their first steps documented clearly?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a clear and documented hierarchy for incident management as part of the incident response plan? Are the first responders and their first steps documented clearly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented incident management hierarchy and first responder steps

questions.prompt: Does the incident management team have representation from the necessary enterprise business units like security architects, legal, HR, infrastructure, endpoints, SOC, etc.?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the incident management team have representation from the necessary enterprise business units like security architects, legal, HR, infrastructure, endpoints, SOC, etc..
questions.evaluation_focus: Cross-functional incident response team representation

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented breach notification process?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented breach notification process.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented breach notification process

questions.prompt: Is the breach notification process reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the breach notification process reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent breach notification process review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise incident management have capability to perform digital forensics?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise incident management have capability to perform digital forensics.
questions.evaluation_focus: Digital forensics capability

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise incident management have a formalized documented process for capturing digital forensic artifacts?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise incident management have a formalized documented process for capturing digital forensic artifacts.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented forensic artifact capture process

questions.prompt: Does the incident management platform automatically capture key artifacts before digital forensics begins?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the incident management platform automatically capture key artifacts before digital forensics begins.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic key artifact capture before forensics

questions.prompt: Is the digital forensics process and technology reviewed for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the digital forensics process and technology reviewed for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent digital forensics process and technology review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a ticketing system to register incidents?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a ticketing system to register incidents.
questions.evaluation_focus: Ticketing system for incident registration

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy advanced AI technologies to automate and orchestrate certain incident handling processes?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise deploy advanced AI technologies to automate and orchestrate certain incident handling processes.
questions.evaluation_focus: Advanced AI for automated incident handling orchestration

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have all the necessary points of contacts listed as part of the incident management plan on who needs to be included when there is an incident?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have all the necessary points of contacts listed as part of the incident management plan on who needs to be included when there is an incident.
questions.evaluation_focus: Points of contact listed in incident management plan
